input:
Rewrite this weak or descriptive resume bullet point into a strong, metrics-driven, action-oriented bullet point using the Google X-Y-Z formula (Accomplished [X] as measured by [Y], by doing [Z]):
"Implemented JWT-based authentication"
output:
"Secured user accounts by implementing JWT-based authentication and Role-Based Access Control (RBAC) using Spring Security, reducing unauthorized access vulnerabilities to zero."

Rationale: Adds context, tools used (Spring Security, RBAC), and a clear security outcome.

input:
Rewrite this weak or descriptive resume bullet point into a strong, metrics-driven, action-oriented bullet point using the Google X-Y-Z formula (Accomplished [X] as measured by [Y], by doing [Z]):
"Designed an intuitive UI with streamlined navigation; independently managed full deployment pipeline and content organisation."
output:
"Designed and deployed a responsive UI using HTML/CSS and JavaScript, improving resource accessibility for 200+ students and reducing navigation time by 30%."

input:
Rewrite this weak or descriptive resume bullet point into a strong, metrics-driven, action-oriented bullet point using the Google X-Y-Z formula (Accomplished [X] as measured by [Y], by doing [Z]):
"Engineered semantic search with document embeddings stored in a vector database, achieving high-accuracy retrieval across large document sets."
output:
"Engineered semantic search using document embeddings and a vector database, improving document retrieval accuracy by 25% across 1,000+ unstructured files."

input:
Rewrite this weak or descriptive resume bullet point into a strong, metrics-driven, action-oriented bullet point using the Google X-Y-Z formula (Accomplished [X] as measured by [Y], by doing [Z]):
"Responsible for managing daily office tasks and supporting team members."
output:
